description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wardrobe with a light wood finish and two large, vertically-oriented doors on the front. The doors feature dark, likely glass or opaque panels, framed by the same light wood as the rest of the structure. Each door is equipped with a small, round knob handle for opening. The top of the wardrobe has a slightly protruding, decorative edge, giving it a classic, paneled appearance. The sides and back are plain, with the same light wood texture and no additional features. This wardrobe is designed to store clothing or other personal items and would be suitable for placement in a bedroom, hallway, or urban residential setting.
description: A tall, light wood wardrobe with two dark-paneled doors and round knob handles, featuring a classic paneled design.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large, dark-paneled doors with round knob handles and a decorative top edge.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, light wood panel with no visible features or hardware.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a flat, unadorned light wood surface with no openings or handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a plain light wood panel.
